import sqlite3


def process_user_uploads(user_ids: list):
    conn = sqlite3.connect("data.db")
    for user_id in user_ids:
        cursor = conn.execute("SELECT * FROM uploads WHERE user_id = ?", (user_id,))
        uploads = cursor.fetchall()
        for upload in uploads:
            conn.execute(
                "UPDATE uploads SET processed = 1 WHERE id = ?",
                (upload[0],),
            )
    conn.commit()
    conn.close()


def sync_external_data(records: list):
    for record in records:
        response = requests.get(f"https://api.example.com/items/{record['id']}")
        data = response.json()
        save_to_cache(record["id"], data)


def generate_reports(users: list):
    for user in users:
        with open(f"/tmp/report_{user.id}.pdf", "wb") as f:
            pdf = create_pdf_report(user)
            f.write(pdf)
